UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the prophetic gaze, visionary warrior spirit, and strong connection to nature embodied by King David as he plays his harp.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the salamander cloak, as it may distract from the overall message of leadership, inspiration, and creative power.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, bagpipes, percussion, uplifting, triumphant, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the manic glee, chaos, and power play embodied by Nero in this reversed King of Wands card.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the fire or flames as they are merely symbols of Nero's destructive nature and influence.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, horns, flutes, percussion, minor, introspective, suspenseful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the King's wisdom, control over fiery passions, and his ability to maintain order amidst chaos.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the restraint aspect as it suggests a lack of freedom. Instead, focus on Arthur's masterful balance.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Wands card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, violins, bagpipes, electric guitar, uplifting, triumphant, energetic, majestic, instrumental
